name: Mechanistic target of rapamycin
role: Ser/Thr kinase integrating nutrient, energy and growth signals

name: Sirtuin 1
role: Nuclear deacetylase regulating metabolism, stress resistance and longevity

name: Sirtuin 2
role: Cytosolic/mitotic deacetylase controlling tubulin and metabolic enzymes

name: Sirtuin 3
role: Mitochondrial deacetylase regulating oxidative metabolism and ATP production

name: AMP-activated protein kinase catalytic subunit alpha-1
role: Cellular energy sensor kinase that promotes catabolic pathways

name: BCL2-like 1 (Bcl-xL)
role: Anti-apoptotic Bcl-2 family protein that blocks cytochrome c release

name: NLR family pyrin domain containing 3
role: Inflammasome sensor driving IL-1β/IL-18 maturation and pyroptosis

name: Kelch-like ECH-associated protein 1
role: E3 ligase adaptor that represses Nrf2 until oxidative stress occurs

name: Forkhead box O3
role: Transcription factor promoting stress resistance, autophagy and longevity

name: Klotho
role: Anti-aging co-receptor and circulating hormone regulating mineral metabolism

name: Telomerase reverse transcriptase
role: Catalytic subunit of telomerase that adds TTAGGG repeats

name: Telomeric repeat-binding factor 1
role: Double-stranded telomeric DNA-binding shelterin component

name: Protection of telomeres 1
role: Binds the 3' ss telomeric overhang to prevent ATR signaling

name: Tumor protein p53
pathway: DNA damage response / cell cycle control
role: Guardian of the genome; induces cell-cycle arrest, senescence or apoptosis

name: Insulin-like growth factor 1 receptor
role: Receptor tyrosine kinase transducing growth, survival and metabolic signals

name: Nicotinamide phosphoribosyltransferase
role: Rate-limiting enzyme of the NAD+ salvage pathway

name: Growth differentiation factor 11
role: Circulating TGF-β family ligand implicated in tissue rejuvenation

name: Regulatory-associated protein of mTOR (Raptor, mTORC1)
role: Scaffold subunit of mTORC1 recruiting TOS-motif substrates

name: Sirtuin 6
role: Nuclear sirtuin regulating DNA repair, metabolism and genomic stability

name: Transcription factor EB
role: Master transcriptional regulator of autophagy-lysosome biogenesis

name: Ribosomal protein S6 kinase B1 (S6K1)
role: Downstream kinase controlling protein synthesis, growth and metabolism

name: Cyclin-dependent kinase inhibitor 2A (p16INK4a)
role: CDK4/6 inhibitor that enforces senescence-associated cell-cycle arrest

name: Poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase 1
role: DNA damage sensor and PARylation enzyme in chromatin remodeling

name: Sirtuin 5
role: Mitochondrial sirtuin regulating metabolic enzyme post-translational modifications

name: Forkhead box M1
role: Pro-proliferative transcription factor that antagonizes senescence
